---
title: 'Structuring College Access'
subtitle: 'The Market Segment Model and College Board Geomarkets'
author: ['Ozan Jaquette', 'Karina Salazar', 'Crystal Han']
institute: ['UCLA', 'University of Arizona', 'Stanford University']
bibliography: ./assets/bib/cb_geomarket_bib.bib
format:
  revealjs:
    revealjs-plugins: [multimodal]   # ← correct key
    theme: [default, ./assets/css/custom.scss]
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
    controls-tutorial: true
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    auto-stretch: false
    slide-level: 3
    menu:
      titleSelector: 'h1, h2, .slide:not(.hide) h3 .menu-title'
      useTextContentForMissingTitles: false
      hideMissingTitles: true
    template-partials:
      - ./assets/html/title-slide.html
include-in-header: ./assets/html/header.html
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=TRUE}

library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
library(tools)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

graphs_dir <- file.path(".", "results", "graphs")
tables_dir <- file.path(".", "results", "tables")

orders_df <- read_csv("scripts/metro_orders.csv")

# Metros where student-list purchase results should not be displayed
# because the orders used additional filters that make interpretation misleading.
# These metros should be treated as RQ0-only.
skip_student_list_metros <- c("houston")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Shared figure insertion helper
# ------------------------------------------------------------

insert_figure <- function(rq, metro, graph_type, base_path = graphs_dir) {
  
  fig_file <- file.path(
    base_path,
    rq,
    stringr::str_c(rq, "_", metro, "_", graph_type, ".png")
  )
  
  title_stub <- file.path(
    base_path,
    rq,
    stringr::str_c(rq, "_", metro, "_", graph_type, "_title")
  )
  
  cap_file_tex <- stringr::str_c(title_stub, ".tex")
  cap_file_txt <- stringr::str_c(title_stub, ".txt")
  
  note_file <- file.path(
    base_path,
    rq,
    stringr::str_c(rq, "_", metro, "_", graph_type, "_note.txt")
  )
  
  if (file.exists(cap_file_tex)) {
    
    caption_text <- readLines(cap_file_tex, warn = FALSE)
    writeLines(caption_text)
    
  } else if (file.exists(cap_file_txt)) {
    
    caption_text <- readLines(cap_file_txt, warn = FALSE)
    writeLines(paste0("#### ", caption_text))
    
  } else {
    
    writeLines("#### No Title Found")
  }
  
  if (file.exists(fig_file)) {
    writeLines(stringr::str_c("![](", fig_file, ")\n"))
  } else {
    writeLines(paste("*(Missing figure file:", fig_file, ")*\n"))
  }
  
  if (file.exists(note_file)) {
    notes_txt <- readLines(note_file, warn = FALSE)
    writeLines(
      stringr::str_c(
        "<div class=\"footnote\">",
        paste0(notes_txt, collapse = "</br>"),
        "</div>"
      )
    )
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Shared heading helpers
# ------------------------------------------------------------

rq_slide_titles <- c(
  rq0 = "RQ0: How unequal are Geomarkets?",
  rq1 = "RQ1: What is the composition of each Geomarket?",
  rq2 = "RQ2: Where does each group come from?",
  rq3 = "RQ3: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?"
)

make_rq_heading <- function(rq_title, rq, hide = FALSE) {
  
  if (hide) {
    
    stringr::str_c("### ", rq_title, " {.hide}")
    
  } else {
    
    rq_menu_title <- stringr::str_to_upper(rq)
    
    stringr::str_c(
      "### ",
      "<span class=\"menu-title\" style=\"display:none;\">&emsp;",
      rq_menu_title,
      "</span>",
      "<span class=\"slide-title\">",
      rq_title,
      "</span>"
    )
  }
}

format_metro_heading <- function(metro) {
  
  if (metro == "dc_maryland_virginia") {
    "D.C., Maryland, and Virginia"
  } else if (metro == "bay_area") {
    "Bay Area"
  } else {
    metro %>%
      stringr::str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      tools::toTitleCase() %>%
      stringr::str_c(" area")
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Main-results settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------

main_results_metros <- c("chicago")
main_results_include_rq0 <- TRUE

main_results_layout <- if_else(
  length(main_results_metros) == 1,
  "by_rq",
  "by_metro"
)

# Pick the middle score-band order for each main-results metro
get_middle_order_id <- function(metro_name) {
  
  order_id <- orders_df %>%
    filter(
      metro == metro_name,
      order_ids != "487927",
      !metro %in% skip_student_list_metros
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      score_low = readr::parse_number(test_range)
    ) %>%
    arrange(score_low) %>%
    slice(ceiling(n() / 2)) %>%
    pull(order_ids)
  
  if (length(order_id) != 1) {
    stop("Expected exactly one middle-order ID for ", metro_name, ", but found ", length(order_id), ".")
  }
  
  order_id
}

main_results_middle_orders <- tibble(
  metro = main_results_metros,
  middle_order_id = map_chr(main_results_metros, get_middle_order_id)
)

if (any(is.na(main_results_middle_orders$middle_order_id)) ||
    any(main_results_middle_orders$middle_order_id == "")) {
  stop("At least one main-results metro has no valid middle-order ID. Check main_results_metros and skip_student_list_metros.")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Main-results figure manifest
# ------------------------------------------------------------

make_main_results_manifest <- function(metro_name) {
  
  middle_order_id <- main_results_middle_orders %>%
    filter(metro == metro_name) %>%
    pull(middle_order_id)
  
  rq0_rows <- tibble(
    rq = "rq1",              # old RQ1 files, displayed as RQ0
    displayed_rq = "rq0",
    graph_type = c("race", "ses")
  )
  
  rq1_rows <- tibble(
    rq = c("rq2", "rq2", "rq2b"),
    displayed_rq = "rq1",
    graph_type = c(
      "race_row_plot",
      "firstgen_row_plot",
      str_c("order_", middle_order_id, "_race_by_firstgen")
    )
  )
  
  rq2_rows <- tibble(
    rq = "rq2",
    displayed_rq = "rq2",
    graph_type = c(
      str_c("race_contribution_overlay_plot_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("firstgen_contribution_overlay_plot_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("race_firstgen_contribution_plot_", middle_order_id)
    )
  )
  
  rq3_rows <- tibble(
    rq = "rq3",
    displayed_rq = "rq3",
    graph_type = c(
      str_c("race_pp_exclusion_plot_order_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("race_relative_exclusion_plot_order_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("firstgen_pp_exclusion_plot_order_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("firstgen_relative_exclusion_plot_order_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("race_firstgen_pp_exclusion_plot_order_", middle_order_id),
      str_c("race_firstgen_relative_exclusion_plot_order_", middle_order_id)
    )
  )
  
  bind_rows(
    if (main_results_include_rq0) rq0_rows else NULL,
    rq1_rows,
    rq2_rows,
    rq3_rows
  ) %>%
    mutate(metro = metro_name)
}
```

# Results

```{r main-results, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
main_results_manifest <- bind_rows(
  map(main_results_metros, make_main_results_manifest)
)

if (main_results_layout == "by_rq") {
  
  for (rq_this in unique(main_results_manifest$displayed_rq)) {
    
    df_rq <- main_results_manifest %>%
      filter(displayed_rq == rq_this)
    
    first_rq_slide <- TRUE
    
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(df_rq))) {
      
      writeLines(make_rq_heading(
        rq_title = rq_slide_titles[[rq_this]],
        rq = rq_this,
        hide = !first_rq_slide
      ))
      
      insert_figure(
        rq = df_rq$rq[j],
        metro = df_rq$metro[j],
        graph_type = df_rq$graph_type[j]
      )
      
      first_rq_slide <- FALSE
    }
  }
  
} else if (main_results_layout == "by_metro") {
  
  for (metro_this in main_results_metros) {
    
    writeLines(str_c("## ", format_metro_heading(metro_this)))
    
    df_metro <- main_results_manifest %>%
      filter(metro == metro_this)
    
    for (rq_this in unique(df_metro$displayed_rq)) {
      
      df_rq <- df_metro %>%
        filter(displayed_rq == rq_this)
      
      first_rq_slide <- TRUE
      
      for (j in seq_len(nrow(df_rq))) {
        
        writeLines(make_rq_heading(
          rq_title = rq_slide_titles[[rq_this]],
          rq = rq_this,
          hide = !first_rq_slide
        ))
        
        insert_figure(
          rq = df_rq$rq[j],
          metro = df_rq$metro[j],
          graph_type = df_rq$graph_type[j]
        )
        
        first_rq_slide <- FALSE
      }
    }
  }
}
```

# Appendix

```{r appendix, echo=FALSE, results = 'asis', eval = TRUE}

insert_rq1_table <- function(metro) {
  table_df <- readRDS(file.path(tables_dir, str_c('rq1_table_', metro, '.rds')))
  table_df$value[is.na(table_df$value)] <- NA_real_
  
  var_order <- c(
    '% White, non-Hispanic', '% Asian, non-Hispanic', '% Black, non-Hispanic', '% Hispanic',
    '% Two+, non-Hispanic', '% NHPI, non-Hispanic', '% AIAN, non-Hispanic',
    'Median income', '% in poverty', '% with BA+'
  )
  
  race_df <- table_df %>% filter(statistic == 'sum', str_detect(variable, '^[^%]*Hispanic'), !str_detect(variable, 'API')) %>%
    group_by(eps_codename, year, statistic) %>% mutate(value = value / sum(value) * 100) %>% ungroup() %>% 
    mutate(
      variable = str_c('% ', variable),
      value = if_else((year == '1980' & str_detect(variable, 'Asian|NHPI|AIAN|Two')), NA_real_, value)
    )
  
  pov_df <- table_df %>% filter(statistic == 'sum', variable %in% c('Poverty', 'Not poverty')) %>%
    group_by(eps_codename, year, statistic) %>% mutate(value = value / sum(value) * 100) %>% ungroup() %>% 
    filter(variable == 'Poverty') %>% 
    mutate(variable = '% in poverty')
  
  edu_df <- table_df %>% filter(statistic == 'sum', variable %in% c('Less than HS', 'HS', 'Less than BA', 'BA+')) %>%
    group_by(eps_codename, year, statistic) %>% mutate(value = value / sum(value) * 100) %>% ungroup() %>% 
    filter(variable == 'BA+') %>% 
    mutate(variable = '% with BA+')
  
  table_df <- bind_rows(
    race_df, pov_df, edu_df,
    table_df %>% filter(variable %in% var_order, statistic != 'sum')
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
      statistic = factor(statistic, levels = c('sum', 'mean', 'sd', 'p25', 'p50', 'p75')),
      variable = factor(variable, levels = var_order),
      value = sprintf('%.1f', value)
    ) %>% 
    arrange(desc(year), statistic) %>% 
    pivot_wider(id_cols = c(eps_codename, variable), names_from = c(statistic, year), values_from = value) %>% 
    arrange(variable, desc(eps_codename))
  
  headings <- unique(table_df$variable)
  headings_group <- rep(nrow(table_df) / length(headings), length(headings))
  names(headings_group) <- headings
  
  kbl(table_df %>% select(-variable), escape = F, col.names = c('', rep(c('Wt. Mean', 'Mean', 'SD', 'P25', 'P50', 'P75'), 3))) %>% 
    pack_rows(index = headings_group, colnum = 1, label_row_css = '') %>% 
    add_header_above(header = c(' ' = 1, '1980' = 6, '2000' = 6, '2020' = 6))
}

insert_rq2_table <- function(metro, table_type, rq_name = 'rq2') {
  table_df <- readRDS(file.path(tables_dir, str_c(rq_name, '_table_', metro, '.rds')))[[table_type]]
  table_df[is.na(table_df)] <- NA_real_
  table_df$order_ids <- as_factor(table_df$order_ids)

  orders <- str_c(if_else(str_detect(unique(table_df$order_ids), '_'), 'Orders ', 'Order '), sub('_', ' & ', unique(table_df$order_ids)), ', ', unique(table_df$test_range))
  orders_group <- table(table_df$order_ids)
  names(orders_group) <- orders
  
  if (table_type == 'race') {
    tables_group <- rep(nrow(table_df) / length(orders) / length(unique(table_df$table)), length(unique(table_df$table)))
    names(tables_group) <- c('Count of purchased students', 'Purchased students by geomarket', 'Purchased students by racial/ethnic group')
  
    return(
      kbl(
        table_df %>%
          mutate(
            across(all, \(x) format(round(x, 0), big.mark = ',')),
            across(race_known, ~ if_else(table == 'col_pct_table' & eps_codename != 'All', sprintf('%.1f', .), format(round(., 0), big.mark = ','))),
            across(white:nhpi, ~ if_else(table == 'count_table' | (table == 'col_pct_table' & eps_codename == 'All'), format(round(., 0), big.mark = ','), sprintf('%.1f', .)))
          ) %>%
          select(-table, -order_ids, -test_range),
        align = 'lrrrrrrrrr', escape = F,
        col.names = c('', 'All', 'Race known', 'White', 'Asian', 'Black', 'Hispanic', '2+ races', 'AIAN', 'NHPI')
      ) %>% 
        pack_rows(index = orders_group, colnum = 1, label_row_css = 'background-color: #eaeaea; padding: 10px 7.5px;') %>% 
        pack_rows(index = rep(tables_group, length(orders)), colnum = 1, label_row_css = '')
    )
  } else if (table_type == 'firstgen') {
    tables_group <- rep(nrow(table_df) / length(orders) / length(unique(table_df$table)), length(unique(table_df$table)))
    names(tables_group) <- c('Count of purchased students', 'Purchased students by geomarket', 'Purchased students by first-generation status')
    
    return(
      kbl(
        table_df %>%
          mutate(
            across(all, \(x) format(round(x, 0), big.mark = ',')),
            across(known, ~ if_else(table == 'col_pct_table' & eps_codename != 'All', sprintf('%.1f', .), format(round(., 0), big.mark = ','))),
            across(first_gen:not_first, ~ if_else(table == 'count_table' | (table == 'col_pct_table' & eps_codename == 'All'), format(round(., 0), big.mark = ','), sprintf('%.1f', .)))
          ) %>%
          select(-unknown, -table, -order_ids, -test_range),
        align = 'lrrrr', escape = F,
        col.names = c('', 'All', 'First-gen known', 'First-gen', 'Not first-gen')
      ) %>% 
        pack_rows(index = orders_group, colnum = 1, label_row_css = 'background-color: #eaeaea; padding: 10px 7.5px;') %>% 
        pack_rows(index = rep(tables_group, length(orders)), colnum = 1, label_row_css = '')
    )
  } else if (table_type == 'race_firstgen') {
    x <- unique(table_df$eps_codename)  # Move "All" row to the end after rest of EPS rows
    table_df$eps_codename <- factor(table_df$eps_codename, levels = c(x[x != 'All'], 'All'))
    table_df <- table_df %>% arrange(order_ids, stu_race_cb, eps_codename)
    
    group_df <- table_df %>% group_by(order_ids, stu_race_cb) %>% summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
    race_group <- group_df$n
    names(race_group) <- str_replace(str_to_title(group_df$stu_race_cb), 'Or', 'or')
    
    return(
      kbl(
        table_df %>% 
          mutate(
            across(all, \(x) format(round(x, 0), big.mark = ',')),
            across(c(row_first_gen, row_not_first_gen), \(x) sprintf('%.1f', x))
          ) %>% 
          select(-stu_race_cb, -order_ids, -test_range),
        align = 'lrrr', escape = F,
        col.names = c('', 'All', 'First-gen', 'Not first-gen')
      ) %>% 
        pack_rows(index = orders_group, colnum = 1, label_row_css = 'background-color: #eaeaea; padding: 10px 7.5px;') %>% 
        pack_rows(index = race_group, colnum = 1, label_row_css = '')
    )
  }
}


# All metros with RQ0 Census/Geomarket results
all_metros <- c(
  "atlanta",
  "bay_area",
  "boston",
  "chicago",
  "cleveland",
  "dallas",
  "dc_maryland_virginia",
  "detroit",
  "houston",
  "long_island",
  "los_angeles",
  "miami",
  "new_york_city",
  "northern_new_jersey",
  "orange_county",
  "philadelphia",
  "san_diego"
)

# Metros with student-list results for RQ1-RQ3,
# excluding special AI/AN-only orders and excluding Houston.
student_list_metros <- orders_df %>%
  filter(order_ids != "487927") %>%
  distinct(metro) %>%
  pull(metro) %>%
  setdiff(skip_student_list_metros)

# Metros with only RQ0 results.
rq0_only_metros <- setdiff(all_metros, student_list_metros)

# Final display order:
# 1. metros with RQ1-RQ3 results, alphabetically
# 2. metros with only RQ0 results, alphabetically
metros <- c(
  sort(student_list_metros),
  sort(rq0_only_metros)
)

rqs <- c("rq0", "rq1", "rq2", "rq3")


# Old RQ1 outputs, now displayed as RQ0
graph_types_rq0 <- c("race", "ses")

# Old RQ2 graph types, now split across displayed RQ1 and RQ2
graph_types_rq_composition <- c("race", "firstgen")

# RQ3 exclusion/delta graph types

graph_types_rq3 <- c(
  "race_pp",
  "race_relative",
  "firstgen_pp",
  "firstgen_relative",
  "race_firstgen_pp",
  "race_firstgen_relative"
)

# Derive the old RQ2/new RQ1-RQ2 metros from the CSV
rq2_metros <- orders_df %>%
  distinct(metro) %>%
  pull(metro) %>%
  setdiff(skip_student_list_metros)

# Derive the RQ3 metros from the CSV, excluding the special AI/AN order
rq3_orders_df <- orders_df %>%
  filter(order_ids != "487927") %>%
  filter(!metro %in% skip_student_list_metros)

rq3_metros <- unique(rq3_orders_df$metro)

# 4) Main loop
for (m in metros) {

  # Convert underscores -> spaces, then title case
  # But add special checks for "dc_maryland_virginia" and "bay_area"
  heading_text <- format_metro_heading(m)

  # Print a top-level heading for the metro area
  writeLines(str_c("## ", heading_text))

  for (rq in rqs) {
    

    rq_title <- rq_slide_titles[[rq]]
    
    # Skip student-list analyses for selected metros.
    # Keep RQ0 because it is based on Census/Geomarket data, not student-list purchases.
    if (m %in% skip_student_list_metros & rq %in% c("rq1", "rq2", "rq3")) {
      next
    }    
    
    # ---------------------------------------------
    # RQ0 Logic: old RQ1
    # Socioeconomic and racial variation between/within Geomarkets over time
    # ---------------------------------------------
    if (rq == "rq0") {

      # Each metro has 2 old-rq1 plots: "race" & "ses"
      for (i in seq_along(graph_types_rq0)) {
        g <- graph_types_rq0[i]

        # The first RQ0 slide for a metro has a visible heading;
        # subsequent ones are hidden slides.
        writeLines(make_rq_heading(
          rq_title = rq_title,
          rq = rq,
          hide = i != 1
        ))
        # Files still live in results/graphs/rq1/
        insert_figure(
          rq = "rq1",
          metro = m,
          graph_type = g
        )
      }
      
      # Add old RQ1 table, displayed as RQ0
      writeLines(str_c("### ", rq_title, " {.hide}"))
      writeLines(str_c("#### Racial/ethnic and socioeconomic characteristics of ", heading_text, " Geomarkets over time"))
      
      writeLines('<div class="table-wrapper freeze-pane">')
      writeLines(insert_rq1_table(m))
      writeLines('</div>')
      writeLines('<div class="footnote">Table Notes:<br>- Race/ethnicity categories not available in 1980 Census: Asian, non-Hispanic; Two+ races, non-Hispanic; NHPI, non-Hispanic; AIAN non-Hispanic<br>- Household income measured using 2024 CPI</div>')
      
      # Add old RQ1 map, displayed as RQ0
      writeLines(str_c("### ", rq_title, " {.hide}"))
      writeLines(str_c("#### Racial/ethnic and socioeconomic characteristics of ", heading_text, " Geomarkets over time"))
      
      rq1_map <- str_c('./results/maps/rq1_map_', m, '.html')
      
      # For maps too big to push to GitHub
      if (!m %in% c("atlanta", "boston", "orange_county", "philadelphia", "san_diego")) {
        rq1_map <- paste0('https://rq1-map-', str_replace_all(m, '_', '-'), '.netlify.app')
      }
      
      writeLines(str_c('<iframe data-src="', rq1_map, '" src="about:blank" width=100% height=100% allowtransparency="true"></iframe>'))
      writeLines('<p class="fullscreen">Fullscreen</p>')
      writeLines('<div class="footnote">Figure Notes:<br>- Race/ethnicity categories not available in 1980 Census: Asian, non-Hispanic; Two+ races, non-Hispanic; NHPI, non-Hispanic; AIAN non-Hispanic<br>- Household income measured using 2024 CPI</div>')

    # ---------------------------------------------
    # RQ1 Logic: What is each Geomarket made of?
    #
    # Formal:
    # To what extent do College Board Geomarkets partition academically similar
    # prospects into racially and socioeconomically distinct pools within
    # metropolitan areas?
    #
    # Uses:
    # - old rq2 race row-percent graph
    # - old rq2 firstgen row-percent graph
    # - old rq2b race x firstgen graphs/table
    # - old rq2 map
    # ---------------------------------------------
    } else if (rq == "rq1") {

      # Only run RQ1 code if the metro is in our student-list orders
      if (!(m %in% rq2_metros)) next

      # Filter orders_df to just rows for this underscored metro
      df_metro <- filter(orders_df, metro == m)

      # If none, skip
      if (nrow(df_metro) == 0) next

      # Gather regular/non-AI/AN order IDs
      orders_for_m <- df_metro$order_ids
      orders_for_m <- orders_for_m[orders_for_m != "487927"]

      get_notes <- function(missing_txt = '') {
        str_replace(
          str_c(
            '<div class="footnote">',
            paste0(
              readLines(
                file.path(graphs_dir, "rq2", str_c('rq2_', m, '_race_row_plot_note.txt')),
                warn = FALSE
              ),
              collapse = "</br>"
            ),
            '</div>'
          ),
          'Excludes students with missing values for race\\. ',
          missing_txt
        )
      }

      first_rq1_slide <- TRUE

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # RQ1A: Within each Geomarket, row percent by race
      #      and row percent by first-gen status
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      for (g in graph_types_rq_composition) {

        writeLines(make_rq_heading(
          rq_title = rq_title,
          rq = rq,
          hide = !first_rq1_slide
        ))
        graph_type_row <- str_c(g, "_row_plot")

        # Files still live in results/graphs/rq2/
        insert_figure(
          rq = "rq2",
          metro = m,
          graph_type = graph_type_row
        )

        first_rq1_slide <- FALSE
      }

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # RQ1B: Within each Geomarket, race x first-gen composition
      # -------------------------------------------------------
      for (order_id in orders_for_m) {

        writeLines(str_c("### ", rq_title, " {.hide}"))

        graph_type_rbf <- str_c("order_", order_id, "_race_by_firstgen")

        # Files live in results/graphs/rq2b/
        insert_figure(
          rq = "rq2b",
          metro = m,
          graph_type = graph_type_rbf
        )
      }

      # Add race x first-gen table, displayed as part of new RQ1
      writeLines(str_c("### ", rq_title, " {.hide}"))
      writeLines(str_c("#### First-generation status by race for ", heading_text, " Geomarkets"))

      writeLines('<div class="table-wrapper freeze-pane">')
      writeLines(insert_rq2_table(m, 'race_firstgen'))
      writeLines('</div>')
      writeLines(get_notes('Excludes students who have missing values for race or parental education. '))

      # Add old RQ2 map, displayed as part of new RQ1
      writeLines(str_c("### ", rq_title, " {.hide}"))
      writeLines(str_c("#### Purchased student profiles by racial/ethnic composition and first-generation status, ", heading_text))

      writeLines(str_c(
        '<iframe data-src="./results/maps/rq2_map_',
        m,
        '.html" src="about:blank" width=100% height=100% style="max-height: 75%" allowtransparency="true"></iframe>'
      ))
      writeLines('<p class="fullscreen">Fullscreen</p>')
      writeLines(get_notes())

    # ---------------------------------------------
    # RQ2 Logic: Which Geomarkets contribute disproportionately?
    #
    # Formal:
    # Which Geomarkets contribute disproportionately to the availability of
    # racially minoritized and first-generation prospects?
    #
    # Uses:
    # - new rq2 race contribution overlay graphs
    # - new rq2 firstgen contribution overlay graphs
    # - new rq2 race x firstgen contribution graphs
    # ---------------------------------------------
    } else if (rq == "rq2") {

      # Only run RQ2 code if the metro is in our student-list orders
      if (!(m %in% rq2_metros)) next

      # Filter orders_df to just rows for this underscored metro
      df_metro <- filter(orders_df, metro == m)

      # If none, skip
      if (nrow(df_metro) == 0) next

      # Gather regular/non-AI/AN order IDs
      orders_for_m <- df_metro$order_ids
      orders_for_m <- orders_for_m[orders_for_m != "487927"]

      first_rq2_slide <- TRUE

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # RQ2A: Race contribution overlay plots
      # -------------------------------------------------------

      for (order_id in orders_for_m) {

        writeLines(make_rq_heading(
          rq_title = rq_title,
          rq = rq,
          hide = !first_rq2_slide
        ))
        
        graph_type_race_overlay <- str_c(
          "race_contribution_overlay_plot_",
          order_id
        )

        insert_figure(
          rq = "rq2",
          metro = m,
          graph_type = graph_type_race_overlay
        )

        first_rq2_slide <- FALSE
      }

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # RQ2B: First-gen contribution overlay plots
      # -------------------------------------------------------

      for (order_id in orders_for_m) {

        writeLines(str_c(
          "### ",
          rq_title,
          " {.hide}"
        ))

        graph_type_firstgen_overlay <- str_c(
          "firstgen_contribution_overlay_plot_",
          order_id
        )

        insert_figure(
          rq = "rq2",
          metro = m,
          graph_type = graph_type_firstgen_overlay
        )
      }

      # -------------------------------------------------------
      # RQ2C: Race x first-gen contribution plots
      # -------------------------------------------------------

      for (order_id in orders_for_m) {

        writeLines(str_c(
          "### ",
          rq_title,
          " {.hide}"
        ))

        graph_type_rfgen_contrib <- str_c(
          "race_firstgen_contribution_plot_",
          order_id
        )

        insert_figure(
          rq = "rq2",
          metro = m,
          graph_type = graph_type_rfgen_contrib
        )
      }    # ---------------------------------------------
      
    # RQ3 Logic: What happens when a Geomarket is excluded?
    #
    # Formal:
    # How does excluding particular Geomarkets change the composition of the
    # prospect pool made visible to colleges?
    # ---------------------------------------------
    } else if (rq == "rq3") {

      # Only run RQ3 code if the metro has RQ3 order groups
      if (!(m %in% rq3_metros)) next

      # Filter to regular/non-AI/AN order groups for this metro
      df_metro_rq3 <- rq3_orders_df %>%
        filter(metro == m)

      # If none, skip
      if (nrow(df_metro_rq3) == 0) next

      # Gather regular order IDs for this metro
      orders_for_m_rq3 <- df_metro_rq3$order_ids

      first_rq3_slide <- TRUE

      for (g in graph_types_rq3) {

        for (order_id in orders_for_m_rq3) {

          writeLines(make_rq_heading(
            rq_title = rq_title,
            rq = rq,
            hide = !first_rq3_slide
          ))
          
          graph_type_rq3 <- str_c(
            g,
            "_exclusion_plot_order_",
            order_id
          )

          insert_figure(
            rq = "rq3",
            metro = m,
            graph_type = graph_type_rq3
          )

          first_rq3_slide <- FALSE
        }
      }

    } # end if/else rq logic
        
  } # end rq loop

} # end metros loop
# A special version insert_figure_aian for AI/AN that does NOT print a heading
insert_figure_aian <- function(rq, metro, graph_type, base_path = graphs_dir) {
  
  fig_file  <- file.path(base_path, rq, paste0(rq, "_", metro, "_", graph_type, ".png"))
  cap_file  <- file.path(base_path, rq, paste0(rq, "_", metro, "_", graph_type, "_title.txt"))
  note_file <- file.path(base_path, rq, paste0(rq, "_", metro, "_", graph_type, "_note.txt"))

  # Instead of printing a heading, let the AI/AN loop do it (#### subtitle).
  # So we skip caption_text or print it differently if you want.

  if (file.exists(fig_file)) {
    writeLines(paste0("![](", fig_file, ")\n"))
  } else {
    writeLines(paste("*(Missing figure file:", fig_file, ")*\n"))
  }

  # Print footnotes (if the .txt file exists)
  if (file.exists(note_file)) {
    notes_txt <- readLines(note_file, warn = FALSE)
    writeLines(
      paste0(
        "<div class=\"footnote\">",
        paste0(notes_txt, collapse = "</br>"),
        "</div>"
      )
    )
  }
}


############################################################################
# 5) AI/AN results loop
############################################################################

# (Level-1) "AI/AN students"
writeLines("# AI/AN students\n")

# The five metros (with 'nyny' last) and the single Native American order
native_metros <- c("chicago", "dallas", "houston", "los_angeles", "nyny")
native_order  <- "487927"

# We want exactly 3 slides per metro, in this order:
var_rc_pairs <- list(
  c("firstgen", "row"),
  c("firstgen", "col"),
  c("race",     "row")
)

for (m in native_metros) {
  
  # (Level-2) heading for each metro (not a slide at slide-level=3)
  heading_text <- if_else(
    m == "nyny",
    "New York City",
    format_metro_heading(m)
  )
  writeLines(paste0("## ", heading_text, "\n"))

  # For each var/rc pair, create a new slide at level-3 (always hidden in TOC)
  for (i in seq_along(var_rc_pairs)) {
    
    g  <- var_rc_pairs[[i]][1]
    rc <- var_rc_pairs[[i]][2]

    # Always hidden from TOC => add "{.hide}" every time
    writeLines(paste0("### ", heading_text, " (AI/AN) {.hide}\n"))

    # (Level-4) subtitle on the same slide
    subtitle <- if (g == "firstgen") {
      "First-generation status composition of purchased AI/AN student profiles by geomarket"
    } else if (g == "race") {
      "Racial composition of purchased AI/AN student profiles by geomarket"
    } else {
      "Other composition of purchased AI/AN student profiles"
    }
    writeLines(paste0("#### ", subtitle, "\n"))

    # Build figure name and call your "no-heading" figure function
    graph_type <- paste0(g, "_", rc, "_plot_", native_order)
    insert_figure_aian(
      rq         = "rq2",
      metro      = m,
      graph_type = graph_type
    )
    
    # Add RQ2 table
    if ((g == 'firstgen' && rc == 'col') | (g == 'race' && rc == 'row')) {
      writeLines(paste0("### ", heading_text, " (AI/AN) {.hide}\n"))
      writeLines(if_else(
        g == 'race',
        str_c('#### Racial/ethnic composition of purchased student profiles by Geomarket, ', heading_text),
        str_c('#### First-generation status of purchased student profiles by Geomarket, ', heading_text)
      ))

      writeLines('<div class="table-wrapper freeze-pane">')
      writeLines(insert_rq2_table(m, g, 'rq2_aian'))
      writeLines('</div>')
      writeLines('<div class="footnote">Figure Notes:<br>- Order number 487927 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; Ethnicity/Race = American Indian or Alaska Native; SAT 1040-1600; GPA B- to A+.</div>')
    }
  }
  
  # Add RQ2 map
  writeLines(paste0("### ", heading_text, " (AI/AN) {.hide}\n"))
  writeLines(str_c("#### Purchased AI/AN student profiles by racial/ethnic composition and first-generation status"))
  
  writeLines(str_c(
    '<iframe data-src="./results/maps/rq2_aian_map_',
    m,
    '.html" src="about:blank" width=100% height=100% allowtransparency="true"></iframe>'
  ))
  writeLines('<p class="fullscreen">Fullscreen</p>')
  writeLines('<div class="footnote">Figure Notes:<br>- Order number 487927 (ordered 7/19/2019): HS class 2020 OR 2021; Ethnicity/Race = American Indian or Alaska Native; SAT 1040-1600; GPA B- to A+.</div>')
}
```
